description.content: Returns the API landing page with links to available resources.
Returns a list of all available data collections in the USGS Water Data API.
Real-time and historical continuous sensor measurements

Returns high-frequency continuous measurement data from USGS automated sensor networks. Includes streamflow, gage height, temperature, and hundreds of other parameters measured at monitoring locations.

query.description: Date/time filter (RFC 3339 or ISO 8601, supports intervals with /)
Maximum number of features to return
CQL2 text filter expression for advanced querying
Comma-separated list of properties to include in response
Property name to sort results by (prefix with - for descending)
USGS parameter code for the measurement type (e.g., 00060 for discharge)

description.content: Returns daily summary water data including mean, median, maximum, and minimum values for streams, lakes, and wells. Aggregates continuous sensor data into daily statistics.

query.description: Date/time filter (RFC 3339 or ISO 8601, supports intervals with /)
Maximum number of features to return
CQL2 text filter expression for advanced querying
Statistical code (e.g., 00003 for mean, 00001 for max)

description.content: Geographic and metadata for USGS monitoring stations
Returns geographic and identification information for USGS water monitoring stations including names, identifiers, coordinates, and hydrologic unit codes.

query.description: Maximum number of features to return
CQL2 text filter expression for advanced querying
Type of monitoring location (e.g., Stream, Lake, Well)

description.content: Returns details for a single USGS water monitoring location by feature ID.

variable.description: (Required) Unique feature identifier for the monitoring location
(Required) Unique feature identifier for the monitoring location
(Required) Unique feature identifier for the monitoring location
(Required) Unique feature identifier for the monitoring location

description.content: Physically measured values from site visits
Returns physically measured values collected during site visits by USGS hydrographers, including streamflow measurements used to define rating curves for continuous data.

query.description: Date/time filter (RFC 3339 or ISO 8601, supports intervals with /)
Maximum number of features to return
CQL2 text filter expression for advanced querying

description.content: Returns metadata about grouped observations including operational thresholds, units of measurement, and time series characteristics for USGS monitoring locations.

query.description: Maximum number of features to return
CQL2 text filter expression for advanced querying

description.content:
The USGS Water Data OGC APIs provide OGC-compliant interfaces to USGS water data including real-time continuous measurements from sensor networks, daily summary values, field measurements, monitoring location metadata, and water quality data. The API follows the OGC API Features specification and supports spatial and temporal filtering via CQL2.

Contact Support:
 Email: wdfn@usgs.gov
